disclosureBoundary.purpose: public benchmark metrics, dataset scope, latency, hashes, and publication integrity only

disclosure.reason: Public benchmark docs disclose outcomes and reproducibility boundaries while keeping non-public materials out of public artifacts.

rows.label: LongMemEval full gate
rows.note: Benchmark-specific retrieval metric; not cross-normalized with LoCoMo.

rows.label: LoCoMo full low-latency gate
rows.scope: 1,982-question retrieval gate with latency optimization enabled
rows.note: Low-latency public row; not promoted as the accuracy headline because top-3 accuracy is slightly lower.

rows.label: LoCoMo 300-query stability gate
rows.note: Current-code rerun of the higher 300-query gate; not a full-dataset replacement row.

rows.label: LoCoMo 300-query tuning gate
rows.note: Best validated 300-query tuning result; not a full-dataset replacement row.

rows.label: LoCoMo 300-query tail-recall gate
rows.scope: 300-query tuning gate focused on high-k recall

qaRows.label: LoCoMo E2E QA dual quality lane, all-category stress score
qaRows.note: Lead quality-lane number: three-run all-category mean. Category 5 is disclosed separately because it uses adversarial empty-answer labels.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo E2E QA dual quality lane, core Categories 1-4
qaRows.scope: 3 x 231 core questions within matched deterministic 300-question gates
qaRows.note: Three-run core diagnostic with the full range disclosed. Parallel candidates plus evidence-only adjudication; quality lane, not the default serving path or a same-mode provider row.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo dual quality lane, adversarial Category 5
qaRows.scope: 3 x 69 adversarial questions within matched deterministic gates
qaRows.note: Robustness lane only; not ordinary answer QA.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo E2E QA all-category stress gate
qaRows.note: Current accepted adaptive gate; +0.66 points over the same-run compact control, +10.00 points over the historical prior gate, and 5.90% lower answer p95 than the matched control. Not a full-dataset or same-mode provider row.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo E2E QA core Categories 1-4
qaRows.scope: 231 core questions within the deterministic 300-question gate
qaRows.note: +0.87 points over the same-run compact control and +13.42 points over the historical prior core slice. Category 5 is reported separately; this is not a same-mode provider row.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo adversarial Category 5 robustness
qaRows.scope: 69 adversarial questions within the deterministic 300-question gate
qaRows.note: Reported separately because Category 5 empty-answer labels do not represent ordinary answer QA.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo E2E QA matched compact control
qaRows.scope: Same 300 questions, retrieval receipt, providers, judge, and run window
qaRows.note: Matched control for isolating the adaptive answer-policy lift from provider/run variance.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo E2E QA prior core Categories 1-4
qaRows.scope: 231 core questions within the historical prior 300-question gate
qaRows.note: Historical prior core slice; not the same-run compact control.

qaRows.label: LoCoMo E2E QA prior gate
qaRows.note: Prior E2E QA gate used for the accepted-gate lift comparison.

metricsSummary.benchmarkProtocolDisclosure: LoCoMo and LongMemEval use different evaluation protocols. LoCoMo Any@3 measures exact-turn retrieval across tightly clustered sessions. LongMemEval Any@3 measures answer-cluster retrieval across a larger haystack. Both are reported without cross-benchmark normalization.
metricsSummary.qaProtocolDisclosure: LoCoMo end-to-end QA accuracy measures judged answers produced from retrieved evidence. The dual quality lane reports a three-run mean and range; the adaptive default and matched control are single complete runs. Core Categories 1-4 and adversarial Category 5 are separate because Category 5 uses empty-answer robustness labels. No slice is comparable to a provider row unless the dataset revision, included categories, answer model, judge, prompt, retrieval depth, cache state, hardware, and raw artifacts are matched.
metricsSummary.qaWeaknessDisclosure: Lead with the 83.67% all-category three-run mean. Category 5 robustness is the accuracy weak spot at a 71.50% mean and primarily tests adversarial no-answer, wrong-person, and evidence-scope handling. Quality-lane answer p95 is 14.630 s; the faster adaptive lane is 7.047 s. These are model-generation and judging latencies, separate from sub-20 ms retrieval.
metricsSummary.providerComparisonBoundary: Provider rows are sourced public figures or third-party documentation unless explicitly marked same-mode. Direct comparison requires matched dataset revision, task, metric, answer model, judge, k, cache state, hardware, and raw artifacts.
